Name: EASTMAN Pneumatic Paint Spray Gun Gravity Feed Sprayer 600ml Cup 3 4 Bar Operating Pressure Ideal Automotive Furniture Metal Painting 1 Inch Air Inlet
Description: EFFICIENT GRAVITY FEED SYSTEM: The EPSG-827A utilizes a top-mounted 600ml gravity feed cup that optimizes fluid flow using gravity. This design ensures virtually 100% material usage with less waste and is significantly easier to clean than traditional suction-feed guns, making it ideal for quick color changes and efficient painting. HIGH-PERFORMANCE ATOMIZATION: Engineered for professional results, this spray gun operates at a rated pressure of 3-4 Bar with an air consumption of 170-300 L/min. It delivers a fine, consistent mist that ensures smooth, even coverage, reducing overspray and creating a high-quality finish on surfaces. UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY & BUILD: Designed with a standard 1/4" Air Inlet (listed as 1.4" on pack, standard size is 1/4"), this tool connects easily to most standard air compressor hoses. Its durable construction is built to withstand the rigors of daily workshop use while maintaining a lightweight feel to reduce wrist fatigue. VERSATILE PAINTIN
